name: Stapled Entity Domestic Treatment Election

eligibility.description: Available to groups of 2 or more entities where more than 50 percent in value of the beneficial ownership consists of stapled interests (interests that must be transferred together).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows certain stapled foreign entities to be treated as domestic corporations, which can be used to consolidate tax attributes or avoid certain foreign-controlled corporation regimes.
